## Meeting Purpose

[Final sync on launch readiness and immediate priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Billing is shipping today:** Estevão will deploy the billing PR, flip Stripe to live mode, and post a test coupon to the channel for team validation.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**UUID migration is complete:** Jose’s successful migration unblocks the brand deduping feature, which he will ship today.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**"Track Company" button logic is defined:** Pedro is merging the button, which will guide users through onboarding, authentication, or to the waitlist based on their status.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**SEO tickets are P1:** Marcel's new SEO tickets, including adding descriptions to categories/subcategories, are now a high priority.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

## Topics

### Billing System

  - [Estevão completed testing and will deploy the billing PR today.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**Deployment Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
    1.  [Ship PR to production.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
    2.  [Perform pre-testing.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
    3.  [Flip Stripe account to live mode.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
    4.  [Test with a 100% discount coupon.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
    5.  [Post coupon to the channel for team-wide testing.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
  - [**Post-Launch Work:**](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Set workspace name to brand name.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Implement "owner-only" billing access (requires Pedro's user role feature).](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Build the paywall and competitor page.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)

### UUID Migration & Brand Deduping

  - [Jose completed the UUID migration, which unblocks the brand deduping feature.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Significance:** The migration was a success despite Render timeouts, updating millions of rows with no data integrity issues.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Today's Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)
    1.  [Ship the brand deduping feature.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
    2.  [Fix subcategory overview charts.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [**Future Work:** Jose will add notes to the "Brands can select their own category" ticket, explaining the new, simpler implementation now that workspaces are categorizable.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### "Track Company" Button

  - [Pedro is merging the "Track Company" button, which will guide users based on their status:](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Onboarded & Logged In:** Triggers a confirmation modal → auto-tracks company & backfills data.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Onboarding Incomplete:** Redirects to the missing step, with the selected company pre-filled.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Not Authenticated:** Redirects to the login/signup page, with the company ID persisted.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Pre-Launch (Not Authenticated):** Redirects to the waitlist form.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Other Tasks:**](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Add brand logo to admin panel (Loom sent).](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Address Marcel's comments on Workspace invite teasers.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [Archive "Fix logo fallback" ticket (4.2.3) as the fix is already live.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)

### SEO & Product Strategy

  - [**SEO Tickets:** Marcel created 5 programmatic SEO tickets (e.g., adding links to cards).](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**Category/Subcategory Descriptions:**](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Add short descriptions to both categories and subcategories for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
      - [**Decision:** P1 priority. Jose will add a note to the ticket about storing descriptions directly in the tables if they are short.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=1009.0)
  - [**Competitive Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Stevie reviewed data vendors (Data for SEO, Bright Data) for historical data.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Conclusion:** Focus on improving our own generator and adding fan-out queries.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
  - [**Product Insight Summaries:**](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [**Idea:** Add a summary of key insights (e.g., AI visibility changes) to the overview page, inspired by Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
      - [**Action:** Create tickets for this and other proactive product improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/AfaGhbUXTRQtYJbJM6ioATBjXYMYYD28?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
